compiled_state.title: [test-implementation-plan-task-description]: echo|grep-q refactor leaves chained pipe in test_operative_template_includes_description_flag -> minor pattern inconsistency
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding from echo|grep-q SIGPIPE fix batch.
Finding 1: [pattern_conformance] grep "ticket create task" <<< "$_step5_section" | grep -q "\-d " still has inner pipe; could be fully converted to direct file grep like the second change.
Finding 2: [hygiene] Inline comment added for direct file grep is helpful but not needed if all instances use the same pattern.
File: tests/scripts/test-implementation-plan-task-description.sh
Category: correctness, hygiene
